description: You are the HR manager at Riverside High School onboarding a new foreign language teacher in OpenSIS. Add Jennifer Torres (jtorres@riverside.edu) as a staff member with the Teacher role. Create a new course named Spanish III (Code: SPAN301, Subject: Foreign Language, Grade Level: 10, Credits: 1.0). Record 'Placement Test' scores for 10th-grade students Carlos Mendez (82) and Ana Nguyen (89) in the Spanish III course. Login credentials: Username: admin, Password: Admin@123
